prompt: A cinematic fitness advertising campaign in a 3-panel collage layout (1:1), featuring a top wide hero shot and two smaller panels below. High-end editorial style with dramatic lighting, strong shadows, and minimal studio environment. Elite female fitness athlete with a strong, sculpted athletic physique. Wearing a beige / sand-toned performance sports bra and matching biker shorts, paired with premium training sneakers and mid-length athletic socks. Hair in a tight high ponytail, subtle sweat highlights for realism. Minimal industrial concrete studio with textured walls and a matte reflective floor. Warm directional lighting with cinematic contrast. Clean, luxury fitness aesthetic. TOP PANEL — HERO STATEMENT: Athlete seated confidently on a matte black training cube, one leg extended, one bent. A black medicine ball placed near her foot. Strong posture, looking off-frame with intensity. Typography (large, bold editorial): “DISCIPLINE BUILDS POWER”. BOTTOM LEFT PANEL — PROFILE / PRESENCE: Close-up side profile, athlete standing or seated slightly turned. Focus on facial structure, posture, and muscle tone. Typography: “CONTROL. CONSISTENCY. CLARITY.” BOTTOM RIGHT PANEL — MENTAL FOCUS: Athlete seated on floor or low block, elbows resting on knees, hand near chin in a thoughtful pose. Medicine ball beside her. Typography: “STRENGTH STARTS WITHIN”. ultra realistic, high detail, 4k, cinematic lighting, soft shadows, global illumination, editorial photography, luxury fitness branding, depth of field, sharp typography
